findings.problem: The chapter keeps footnoting Aldric's softened register after the dialogue has already made it legible. Because the boundary pack calls for this change to stay subtle, the repeated explanatory glosses about his pauses, unsolicited observations, gentler humor, and quieter consumption voice flatten the opening into commentary instead of letting the altered relationship live on the page.
findings.rewrite_direction: Trim or recomposition the interpretive follow-ups at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:19; snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:27; snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:43; snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:175 so the pauses, unprompted readings, and gentler joke do more of the work themselves. Keep Maren's awareness of the change, but concentrate it into one sharper observation attached to a specific beat instead of re-explaining each new example.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised material built around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:9, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:25, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:37, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:175 demonstrates Aldric's softer cadence through scene action and dialogue, with no more than one separate interpretive gloss naming the change afterward. Fail if the revision still pauses after each beat to explain that his pauses, jokes, or tone are different now.

findings.problem: Thessa's assignment line echoes a calibration-only style-bible example too closely: same eastward route, same twelve-mile distance, same farmstead household with children in clipped sequence. Because this lands inside the chapter-defining beat where she acknowledges Maren as working help, the echo damages voice integrity instead of merely sounding derivative.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the assignment delivery at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:79 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:85 so the information arrives in a materially different order and with chapter-specific operational emphasis. Thessa can stay blunt, but the line needs a fresh syntax and priority structure rather than route-plus-distance-plus-farmhouse-plus-children as a checklist.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised assignment at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:79 no longer uses the clipped scaffold of direction, twelve-mile distance, farm/farmhouse label, and child count in sequence, and instead foregrounds a different practical concern before at least one of those facts. Fail if the new line still reads as an eastward twelve-mile farmstead-with-children prompt.

findings.problem: Too many Maren/Aldric exchanges run on the same ladder: Aldric delivers a formal report, Maren translates or needles, Aldric answers with a dry correction. The rhythm is initially pleasurable, but by the latter half of the chapter it starts to feel pre-shaped rather than discovered in the moment, which reduces leverage shifts and makes the buddy register more uniform than lived.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework at least two of the exchange clusters anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:11; snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:39; snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:177; snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:239 so they do not all resolve as report, paraphrase, correction. Let one beat stay unanswered, let another turn into a concrete question, or let one exchange yield a new emotional disclosure instead of another dry tag.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if at least two of the four cited exchanges no longer follow Aldric report -> Maren paraphrase or tease -> Aldric corrective button, and at least one revised exchange changes leverage by adding new emotional or tactical information. Fail if all four beats still end in the same report-and-ribbing cadence.

findings.problem: The closing lands its meaning concretely through the meal, the clean water, the child in the doorway, and the audible life returning to Barren Rill, then paraphrases that meaning in abstract thesis language. Once the chapter has already proved Maren's new ordinary work on the ground, the line about what the world 'needed' and the retrospective bowl summary start re-stating the arrival instead of sharpening it.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress or replace the abstract coda at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:235 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:245. Preserve the must-land beats from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:223 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:245, but let the ending close on one fresh concrete image or action at the road fork rather than a thematic paraphrase of what sin-eaters are for.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised closing after snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:223 ends on a concrete road, bowl, hum, or fork image and contains no abstract sentence equivalent to the current general claim at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:235. Fail if the revision still explains in general terms what the world needs after the clean yard, payment, and waving child have already made the chapter's point legible.

summary: No continuity contradiction, tense drift, or operational-legibility failure surfaced, and the chapter does land the intended state shift of Maren doing ordinary real work. It still fails this review because it over-explains Aldric's softened relationship beat, echoes a calibration-only Thessa line in a structural scene, reuses the same Aldric/Maren exchange ladder too often, and turns the concrete closing into thematic paraphrase once the chapter has already arrived.
